raw_text:
ERROR   [TC-D-003] interface.f90:2 <-> header.h:3
  COMPLEX_SRET_LEGACY: On 32-bit SPARC, DOUBLE COMPLEX function return
  requires hidden leading argument (dcomplex *result). C prototype omits
  this argument. On 32-bit: all arguments shift by one; n reads x, x
  reads incx, etc. Total argument corruption.

NOTE: This interface lacks BIND(C). Use BIND(C) with COMPLEX(c_double_complex)
      to get defined, portable behaviour.
